TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions.
tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.
ktokd LIKE kna1-ktokd, " customer account group
budat LIKE bsid-budat, "Posting date in the document
bldat LIKE bsid-bldat, "Document date in document
dmbtr LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
wrbtr LIKE bsid-wrbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netbal LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
not_due_cr TYPE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
not_due_db TYPE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
not_due TYPE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit30 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit30 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb30 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit60 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit60 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb60 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit90 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit90 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb90 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit120 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit120 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb120 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit180 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit180 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb180 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit360 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit360 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb360 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit720 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit720 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb720 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit730 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit730 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb730 LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
debit_ab LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
credit_ab LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.
netb_ab LIKE bsid-dmbtr, "Amount in local curr.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: READ TABLE GT_ITEM INTO LS_ITEM INDEX 1.
* Ftech info for Mode Of Transport
* Get Insurance No.(ADDED BY NILAY B ON 30.12.2023)
* STR = 'شركة ديلفال فلو كنترولز الشرق الأوسط المحدودة' .
STR = 'شركة ديلفال فلو كونترولز الشرق الأوسط المحدودة'.
DATA : VDT(2) TYPE C,VMN(2) TYPE C,VYR(4) TYPE C.
CONCATENATE VYR '-' VMN '-' VDT INTO GVINVDT.
DATA: ITAB TYPE IDATA OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE ITAB
FROM BSID INNER JOIN KNB1 ON BSID~KUNNR = KNB1~KUNNR AND KNB1~BUKRS = BSID~BUKRS
FROM BSAD INNER JOIN KNB1 ON KNB1~KUNNR = BSAD~KUNNR
LOOP AT ITAB WHERE VBELN = LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-BIL_NUMBER.
* DATA : VDT(2) TYPE C,VMN(2) TYPE C,VYR(4) TYPE C.
CONCATENATE VYR '-' VMN '-' VDT INTO GVDUEDT.
SELECT SINGLE BSTKD INTO PURCH_NO FROM VBKD WHERE VBELN =
*DATA : VDT(2) TYPE C,VMN(2) TYPE C,VYR(4) TYPE C.
CONCATENATE VYR '-' VMN '-' VDT INTO GVPODT.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
LV_CNM = 'DelVal Flow Controls Middle East Co. Ltd. '.
SELECT ERZET INTO GV_QTM FROM VBRK
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE LV_LINES INTO LINES INDEX 1.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE LV_LINES INTO LINES INDEX 1.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 1.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 2.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 3.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 4.
* READ TABLE IT_LINES INTO WA_LINES INDEX 5.
SELECT * FROM ZVEHICLE_TB INTO TABLE IT_VEHICLE
READ TABLE IT_VEHICLE INTO WA_VEHICLE INDEX 1.
READ TABLE IT_VEHICLE INTO WA_VEHICLE INDEX 2.
READ TABLE IT_VEHICLE INTO WA_VEHICLE INDEX 3.
READ TABLE IT_VEHICLE INTO WA_VEHICLE INDEX 4.
READ TABLE IT_VEHICLE INTO WA_VEHICLE INDEX 5.
CONCATENATE 'Customer Material No.:' GV_KDMAT INTO LV_KDMAT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'Series:' GV_SERIES INTO LV_SERIES SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'Series:' GV_SERIES 'HS CODE:' GV_STEUC INTO LV_SERIES SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LV_LINES TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
LV_LINES1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE GV_ENG WA_LINES-TDLINE INTO GV_ENG SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE GV_ARAB WA_LINES1-TDLINE INTO GV_ARAB SEPARATED BY SPACE.
*DATA(LV_DATA_OTHER) = LV_ZOTH + LV_ZFR1 + LV_ZDC1 + lv_zin1 + lv_zte1 + lv_zpfo.
READ TABLE it_vbak_data INTO DATA(WA_VBAK) WITH KEY vbeln = gs_item-AUBEL.
READ TABLE it_dsd INTO DATA(WA_DSD) WITH KEY KNUMV = WA_VBAK-knumv
IF GV_BASE_AMT NE 0 OR GV_BASE_AMT IS NOT INITIAL .
* GV_SUB_TOT_TAX = GV_SUB_TOT + GV_PF + GV_FRI + GV_DC + GV_INS
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALALAS' INTO GV_GST_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_GST_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALALAS' INTO GV_TOT_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_TOT_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALALAS' INTO GV_TOT_WRD1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_TOT_WRD1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM LT_ITEMS COMPARING VENUM.
* CONCATENATE 'PF Charges @' LV_PF '%' INTO LWA_FOOT-HEAD SEPARATED BY ''.
GV_BASE_AMT = GV_PF + GV_FRI + GV_DC + GV_INS + GV_TEST + GV_OTH + GV_BASE_AMT . "added by amit
CONCATENATE 'Sub Total(' LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-BIL_WAERK ')' INTO LWA_FOOT-HEAD SEPARATED BY ''.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALALAS' INTO GV_TOT_WRD1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_TOT_WRD1 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* CONCATENATE 'SAUDI RIYAL' IN_WORDS-WORD 'ONLY' INTO ls_word_AR SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* CONCATENATE 'SAUDI RIYAL' IN_WORDS-WORD 'AND' IN_WORDS-DECWORD 'HALLALS ONLY' INTO ls_word_AR SEPARATED BY SPACE.
** ls_word-decword 'HALALAS' INTO GV_GST_WRD_AR SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_GST_WRD_AR SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* GV_SUB_TOT_TAX = GV_SUB_TOT + GV_PF + GV_FRI + GV_DC + GV_INS
* GV_SUB_TOT_TAX = GV_SUB_TOT + GV_PF + GV_FRI + GV_DC + GV_INS
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALAL' INTO GV_GST_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_GST_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALAL' INTO GV_TOT_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
* ls_word-decword 'HALALAS' INTO gv_tot_wrd SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ' INTO GV_TOT_WRD SEPARATED BY SPACE.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM LT_ITEMS COMPARING VENUM.
DATA(LV_QR1) = GV_CTAXINVTEXT && LV_CNM && LV_VNO && GV_QIDT && GV_QIDTF && GV_QTM && GV_QIAMT && '(' && LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-BIL_WAERK && ')'

FORMS.FPCLINE: DATA : TEXT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
